name: AOSP Build ID normalization
rule: Store AOSP Build ID separately from vendor firmware strings such as Samsung PDA/AP/CSC/CP.

name: Platform-Tools identity
rule: ADB/Fastboot troubleshooting requires host-tool version and device state; do not infer root/bootloader status from adb availability alone.

name: Official support guard
rule: For LineageOS/TWRP, 'nearly identical' devices are not sufficient; store codename and exact model before any fix/flash recommendation.
